# llms.txt — Machine-readable project description for AI agents
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

> Project: audio-layer
> Version: 0.1.x
> Purpose: Multi-platform audio intake + meeting transcription app.
> Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vercel AI SDK v6
> Shells: Web (hosted on Vercel), Capacitor (iOS + Android), Tauri (macOS + Windows)
> Transcription: AssemblyAI Universal-3 Pro (direct — NOT routed via Gateway)
> LLM Gateway: Vercel AI Gateway (Claude Sonnet 4.6 default for summaries)
> Observability: Langfuse via OTEL (auto-traces all AI SDK calls)
> Testing: Vitest (unit), Playwright (E2E)
> Package Manager: pnpm

## Routes
- `/`                                     Hub
- `/record`                               V1 batch: upload or mic-record → redirects to /meetings/[id] on completion
- `/record/live`                          V2 streaming (u3-rt-pro): live transcript, persists on Stop
- `/meetings`                             Recent recordings (persisted)
- `/meetings/[id]`                        Single-meeting detail (transcript + summary); polls while non-terminal
- `/chat`                                 Reference chat with tool calls (from starter kit)
- `/observability`                        AI call logs / costs / errors dashboard
- `POST /api/transcribe`                  Upload audio → submit AssemblyAI job → insert Meetings row → return id
- `GET  /api/transcribe/[id]`             Poll batch job; on completion summarize + persist into MeetingsStore
- `POST /api/transcribe/stream/token`     Mint AssemblyAI ephemeral token + allocate meetingId
- `POST /api/transcribe/stream/finalize`  Persist streaming transcript + summary at session end
- `GET  /api/meetings`                    List recent meetings (limit=50, max=200)
- `GET  /api/meetings/[id]`               Fetch single persisted meeting
- `POST /api/chat`                        Streaming chat endpoint
- `GET  /api/ai-logs`                     Observability log feed (list/stats/errors)

## Key Files
- AGENTS.md                          Agent context (locked stack, do-not-do list)
- instrumentation.ts                 Next.js instrumentation → Langfuse OTEL bootstrap
- lib/langfuse-setup.ts              Langfuse span processor
- lib/ai/telemetry.ts                withTelemetry() config + in-memory log ring buffer
- lib/ai/tool-meta.ts                Tool registry (single source of truth)
- lib/assemblyai/client.ts           AssemblyAI SDK factory (cached)
- lib/assemblyai/schema.ts           Zod schema for MeetingSummary (title, summary, bullets, action items, decisions, participants)
- lib/assemblyai/summary.ts          generateObject through Gateway with telemetry
- lib/assemblyai/types.ts            Client↔Server transcribe response types
- lib/supabase/server.ts             Server-side Supabase client factory (service-role; null if env missing)
- lib/supabase/schema.sql            `meetings` table DDL — run once via SQL editor / psql
- lib/meetings/store.ts              MeetingsStore interface + auto-selecting factory
- lib/meetings/store-supabase.ts     Supabase-backed MeetingsStore implementation
- lib/meetings/store-in-memory.ts    Dev fallback (FIFO 500 entries)
- lib/meetings/types.ts              Meeting, MeetingListItem, MeetingInsert, MeetingUpdate
- app/api/transcribe/route.ts                        POST: upload + submit + insert Meetings row
- app/api/transcribe/[id]/route.ts                   GET: poll + summarize on completion + persist
- app/api/transcribe/stream/token/route.ts           POST: mint AssemblyAI ephemeral token + meetingId
- app/api/transcribe/stream/finalize/route.ts        POST: summarize + persist at stream end
- app/api/meetings/route.ts                          GET list
- app/api/meetings/[id]/route.ts                     GET single
- app/record/page.tsx                                Batch UI (upload + mic recorder); redirects to /meetings/[id]
- app/record/live/page.tsx                           Streaming UI (u3-rt-pro)
- app/meetings/page.tsx                              Recent meetings list
- app/meetings/[id]/page.tsx                         Meeting detail (server-rendered + client poller)
- components/meeting-detail-poller.tsx               Polls /api/transcribe/[id] then router.refresh() on completion
- components/audio-recorder.tsx                      MediaRecorder wrapper (browser mic)
- components/live-recorder.tsx                       AudioContext+Worklet+StreamingTranscriber session
- components/live-transcript-view.tsx                Finalized + partial turn rendering
- components/transcript-view.tsx                     Speaker-segmented transcript + summary panel
- public/worklets/pcm-downsampler.js                 AudioWorklet: 48k/44.1k → 16k int16 LE, 150 ms chunks

## Locked Decisions (do not re-debate)
- Transcription engine: AssemblyAI Universal-3 Pro. Batch uses `speech_model: 'best'`. Streaming uses `u3-rt-pro` (next PR).
- Vercel AI Gateway does NOT route STT providers as of April 2026. AssemblyAI goes DIRECT.
- Persistence: Supabase `meetings` table. Dev can run without it (in-memory fallback); production MUST set SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and run schema.sql.
- Desktop shell: Tauri (not Electron).
- Mobile shell: Capacitor.
- Every `generateText` / `generateObject` / `streamText` call spreads `withTelemetry({ label })` — enforced by `pnpm compliance`.

## Testing
- `pnpm typecheck`       TypeScript
- `pnpm test`            Vitest unit tests
- `pnpm test:smoke`      Playwright smoke on main routes
- `pnpm test:e2e`        Full Playwright suite
- `pnpm compliance`      Pattern enforcement (telemetry, no @ts-nocheck, etc.)
- `pnpm build`           Next.js production build

## AI SDK v6 Patterns (CRITICAL)
- Use `inputSchema` NOT `parameters`
- Use `toUIMessageStreamResponse()` NOT `toDataStreamResponse()`
- Message format: `message.parts[]` NOT `message.content`
- Tool states: input-streaming | input-available | output-available | output-error
- `addToolOutput` NOT `addToolResult`; `sendMessage` NOT `append`
- Use `generateObject({ schema, ... })` for structured output (e.g., MeetingSummary)

## Docs
- docs/architecture/ — System design
- docs/guides/       — How-to guides
- docs/reference/    — Auto-generated from registries
